telebirr_fraud: Use Telebirr mobile-money transaction logs (anonymized) to train fraud detection — a classic imbalanced classification problem for Ethiopian fintech.
teff_yield: Predict teff yield from rainfall and soil features using regional agricultural open data — regression with missing values common in field surveys.
amharic_rag: Build a bilingual Amharic+English RAG assistant for an NGO policy PDF corpus — chunking, embedding choice, and citation grounding matter more than model size.
addis_traffic: Forecast Addis Ababa corridor congestion from sparse GPS probes — time-series features and weekend/holiday calendars (Ethiopian calendar) improve models.
low_bandwidth: Serve quantized models via Ollama on a laptop when cloud APIs are costly or connectivity is intermittent — standard MLOps concern in Ethiopia.
etb_cost: Track inference cost in ETB per 1k tokens when choosing between cloud APIs and self-hosted small models.
sme_digital: Ethiopian SMEs adopting ChatGPT for customer support in Amharic — evaluate hallucination risk before production.
ict_park: Teams at Addis ICT Park often prototype on Colab then deploy on modest VPS — containerize early.
